Canth..Back: Violent lancinating pains through the kidneys and back. Pains in the loins and abdomen.
Canth..Back, pain: Violent lancinating pains through the kidneys and back. Pains in the loins and abdomen.
Canth..Bladder: The bladder and genitals are inflamed and the excitement and congestion of the parts often arouse the sexual instinct, so that there are sexual thoughts and sexual frenzy.
Canth..Bladder, urination, frequent: Violent pains with frequent urging. Constant tenesmus.
Canth..Chest: Inflammation of the lungs, gangrenous type, prostration and the lung that is affected burns like fire, and immediately he expectorates cadaverous smelling expectoration, thin, bloody, watery; it has come on in an astonishingly rapid manner.
Canth..Generalities: The most important feature of this medicine is the inflammatory condition, and the most important characteristic in the inflammation is the rapidity with which it develops into a gangrenous state.
Canth..Generalities, pain, burning, internally: Running all through the remedy there is burning. In the head burning, throbbing and stabbing.
Canth..Genitalia female: In the female there is oversensitiveness of all parts. Inflammation of the ovaries and uterus. Burning in the vagina. Membranous dysmenorrhoea. Menses too early, profuse, black.
Canth..Head: Violent, bursting, lancinating headaches as if stabbed with a knife an inflammatory condition that takes hold of the mind violently.
Canth..Mind: Sudden loss of consciousness with red face. Suddenly goes into stupor. Confusion of mind. Overwhelmed with strange ideas. Thoughts run riot, and go whatever way they will, as if possessed by outside influence.
Canth..Rectum: Desire for stool while urinating. The patient will sit on the commode with violent tenesmus to pass urine and stool, feels that if he could only pass a few more drops of urine or a little more bloody stool he would get relief, but no relief comes.
Canth..Rectum, pain: Desire for stool while urinating. The patient will sit on the commode with violent tenesmus to pass urine and stool, feels that if he could only pass a few more drops of urine or a little more bloody stool he would get relief, but no relief comes. All the parts are inflamed and on fire.
Canth..Rectum, pain, burning: All the parts are inflamed and on fire. Tenesmus and urging not only when the bladder is empty, but often when the bladder is full.
Canth..Skin: Eruptions burn when touched, ever so lightly, i.e., those eruptions such as the remedy could produce.
Canth..Stomach: Burning in the throat. Great thirst, with burning in the throat and stomach. Thirst, with aversion to all fluids, that is, the craving of the mouth and throat are antagonized by the mental state.
Canth..Stomach, pain: Violent, burning in the stomach, pylorus, abdomen.
Canth..Stomach, pain, burning: Violent, burning in the stomach, pylorus, abdomen.
Canth..Abdomen, pain: The abdomen is swollen and tympanitic; lancinating pains cutting and stabbing. Pains in the loins and abdomen.
Canth..Bladder, urination: Burning when urinating. This bloody urine burns like fire in the bladder and about the genitals. Retention or suppression of urine.
Canth..Generalities, pain: The most important feature of this medicine is the inflammatory condition, and the most important characteristic in the inflammation is the rapidity with which it develops into a gangrenous state.
Canth..Generalities, pain, burning: Running all through the remedy there is burning. In the head burning, throbbing and stabbing.
Canth..Generalities, side: Burning in the side of the head. Stitches in the side of the head and occiput.
Canth..Appetite: Great thirst, with burning in the throat and stomach.
Canth..Appetite, aversion: Thirst, with aversion to all fluids, that is, the craving of the mouth and throat are antagonized by the mental state. Thirst in the throat and an aversion to water in the mind.
Canth..Clinical: It is rare that one suffering from gonorrhea has this violent inflammation, with burning and tenesmus of the bladder and rectum, but in such a case this remedy is indicated. The intensity and rapidity are the features of this remedy.
Canth..Genitalia female, uterus: Inflammation of the ovaries and uterus. When there have been no expulsive pains present to expel the afterbirth, with the symptoms running all through this remedy, after it has been given, normal contractions of the uterus have come on with expulsion of the membranes.
